testcase.name: Order Entry - Screenplay Pattern › should create new order via Order Entry form @beta
testcase.system-out:
🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Perform complete login for beta environment 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Navigate to "https://betabqc.ghtcorptest.com/" 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Login with credentials (qaauto) 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Fill field with "qaauto" 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Fill field with "qaauto" 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Click on element
⏱️ LOGIN COMPLETADO en 5894 ms (5.89s) 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Navigate to Order Entry (Sales > New > Order Entry) 🧭 Navegando: Sales -> New -> Order Entry ▶️ Click en Sales... ▶️ Click en New... ▶️ Click en Order Entry... ✅ Formulario Order Entry cargado
⏱️ NAVEGACIÓN COMPLETADA en 2555 ms (2.56s) 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Fill Order Entry form for Customer 6099 📋 Llenando formulario Order Entry... • Customer: 6099 (WAL-MART 6099-MACCLENNY) • Shipping Date: +5 días • P.O. Number: QAAuto • Order Behavior: Regular • Integration Code 1: BRDR-U023 • Integration Code 2: CBS2-Q186 👤 Ingresando Customer... ⌨️ Escribiendo "6099" carácter por carácter... ✓ Código digitado: 6099 ⏳ Esperando lista de opciones del autocomplete... ✅ Customer seleccionado: WAL-MART 6099-MACCLENNY 📅 Configurando Shipping Date... ✅ Fecha configurada: 03/11/2026 📝 Ingresando P.O. Number... ⚙️ Configurando Order Behavior: Regular... ✅ Order Behavior seleccionado: Regular 🔑 Ingresando Integration Code 1... ⏳ Esperando opciones del autocomplete... ⚠️ Opción específica no encontrada, usando método de teclado ⏳ Esperando carga de Integration Code 1... ✅ Carga completada 🔄 Preparando Integration Code 2... 🔑 Ingresando Integration Code 2... ⏳ Esperando opciones del autocomplete... ⚠️ Opción específica no encontrada, usando método de teclado ⏳ Esperando carga de Integration Code 2... ✅ Carga completada ✅ Integration Codes procesados completamente 📦 Llenando Grid Items... - Fila 1: Boxes 27, Price 2.34 ⏳ Esperando que el precio se procese... - Fila 2: Boxes 36, Price 0.212 ⏳ Esperando que el precio se procese... ✅ Grid Items completados ✅ Formulario completado
⏱️ FORMULARIO COMPLETADO en 39894 ms (39.89s) 🎭 Actor "QA Order Creator" attempts to: Save order 💾 Guardando orden... ⏳ Esperando que se procese la orden... 🔄 Loader detectado... ✅ Loader desapareció ✅ Orden guardada
⏱️ ORDEN GUARDADA en 6578 ms (6.58s) ❓ Actor "QA Order Creator" asks: Generated order number
🎉 ORDEN GENERADA: 155009 ✅ Número de orden válido: 155009
============================================================ 📊 RESUMEN DE TIEMPOS ============================================================ 01_Login : 5894ms (5.89s) 02_Navigation : 2555ms (2.56s) 03_Form_Fill : 39894ms (39.89s) 04_Save_Order : 6578ms (6.58s) ------------------------------------------------------------ TOTAL : 54921ms (54.92s) ============================================================
============================================================ 📊 Resumen de Performance ============================================================ Total de requests: 340 Duración promedio: 347ms Request más lento: GET https://ghtstoragecdn.blob.core.windows.net/test/main.js (2210ms) ⚠️ Requests lentos (>2000ms): 1 ❌ Requests fallidos (status >= 400): 2
Requests por método: GET: 254 POST: 86 ============================================================

testcase.name: Order Entry - Screenplay Pattern › should validate required fields
